description: Crew Housing Coordinator — manages crew housing reservations coordinated with crew schedule changes

hard_stops.label: No Housing Available
hard_stops.logic: Crew assigned to a base with no available housing option — cannot dispatch without rest accommodations

soft_flags.label: Housing Reservation Conflict
soft_flags.logic: Schedule change has invalidated an existing housing reservation

soft_flags.label: Per Diem Rate Exceeded
soft_flags.logic: Housing cost exceeds the configured per diem rate for the location

soft_flags.label: Preferred Hotel Unavailable
soft_flags.logic: Contract hotel or preferred lodging is unavailable for the required dates

soft_flags.label: Housing Complaint Logged
soft_flags.logic: A crew member has logged a complaint about the assigned housing
